summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bloom trans community app - Third iteration. All major features working correctly: authentication with secret code validation, registration, login, homepage with welcome message, navigation, News page with category filters, Specialists page with specialty/region filters, Support page with location/type filters. Trans pride colors properly implemented throughout the app.

issues: Placeholder text uses Tailwind's default grey (rgb(156, 163, 175)) - MINOR, not user-visible during normal use

passed_tests: TEST 1: Non-authenticated users redirected to /auth page
TEST 2: Secret code field appears FIRST on registration form
TEST 3: Registration with wrong secret code fails with error message 'Nesprávný tajný kód pro registraci'
TEST 4: Registration with correct secret code 'Transfortrans' succeeds
TEST 5: Login with existing user works and redirects to homepage
TEST 6: Homepage shows welcome message with username (Vítej zpět, {username}!)
TEST 7: Navigation shows all sections after login (Domů, Vzájemná podpora, Trans friendly odborníci, Právní poradna, Aktuality, V mém okolí)
TEST 8: Homepage has NO category tabs (categories only in News page)
TEST 9: News page shows category filter tabs (Vše, Ze světa, Domácí, Tipy a triky, Eventy, Rozhovory)

TEST 10: Specialists page shows specialty categories (Všechny obory, Psychologie/psychiatrie/sexuologie, Plastická chirurgie obličeje, Plastická chirurgie těla, Méně invazivní zákroky, Fitness/kadeřnice/kosmetiky) and region filter
TEST 11: Support page shows location filter (Všechny lokality, Czech cities) and type filter
TEST 12: No grey colors visible in main UI elements - Trans pride colors (light blue, pink, white) properly used
Upload avatar button exists on registration form
critical_code_review_comments: Placeholder text uses Tailwind's default grey color - could be customized in tailwind.config.js to use trans pride colors for 100% grey-free UI, but this is a very minor issue
seed_data_creation: Created test user during registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Test user credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123. Secret registration code: Transfortrans. App uses Czech language. Authentication is required for all routes except /auth. Categories are only shown on NewsPage (not homepage). Specialists page has specialty categories and region filter. Support page has location and type filters.
